LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THOMAS BYUN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-18-2008 TO FEB-19-2008 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT'S THOMAS BYUN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION THREE, FIVE AND NINE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BASED ON THE ONE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, C.C.P. 340 (1). MENEFEE V OSTAWARI (1991) 228 CAL. APP. 3D 239, 243 THROUGH 244. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN FIVE DAYS AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION SIX, SEVEN, EIGHT, TEN AND ELEVEN IN THAT PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ALLEGE A DUTY OF CARE APART FROM LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP. SUCH A RELATIONSHIP DOES NOT CREATE AN INDEPENDENT DUTY OF CARE. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

ORDER RE: DEFENDANT'S (THOMAS BYUN) DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART/SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART/OVERRULED IN PART, SEE ORDER AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS)
